narrative:
Green Pp (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,359 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.9 percentage points.
